name: colin-dotfiles
description: Shipping, multi-model review, framework skills, CLI bridges, and Megamind

plugins.name: colin-shipping
plugins.description: Review, merge, multi-model MBOT/MBOD workflows, platform CLIs, and shipping skills (includes former slash commands as skills)

plugins.name: colin-frameworks
plugins.description: Framework and stack skills: Nuxt UI/Content, Drizzle, VoltAgent, Playwright E2E, Nano Banana

plugins.name: colin-cli-bridges
plugins.description: Shell-out skills for claude, codex, and grok CLIs from other host agents

plugins.name: megamind
plugins.description: Autonomous large-task delivery agent and skill. Depends on colin-shipping (MBOT/MBOD). Use the agent when the host supports it (Claude Code, grok --agent megamind); otherwise use the megamind skill.
